posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: Joe Kent, the US Director of Counter-terrorism, just RESIGNED stating that Trump was lying about Iran posing an imminent threat, and that we only started this war for Israel. 

MAGA, how is it America first to have our men and women die for another country?

Trumps own FBI found the woman who accused him of raping her as a child to be credible. For anyone else, this would be the end of their political career.

But, MAGA won’t care. Just like they didn’t care about him raping E Jean Carroll or sexually exploiting pageant girls. Sad.

“We didn’t start this war, we just bombed them first”


Fox News (@FoxNews)

BREAKING: War Secretary Pete Hegseth tells nation, 'We didn't start this war, but under President Trump, we are finishing it'





— https://nitter.net/FoxNews/status/2028457893419246024#m

Fuck. The war has started. History is repeating itself, we have once again been left with Israel and War. 

THIS IS NOT WHAT THE AMERICAN PEOPLE WANT.

I know that the insane has become the normal, but we all need to pay attention to this:

According to members of Congress and independent reporting, Donald Trump illegally hid files alleging that he raped a child.

This is the biggest presidential scandal of your life.
The Trump Administration needs to issue refund checks to all Americans for their Illegal tax.

🚨BREAKING: The Supreme Court has STRUCK DOWN Trump’s Tariffs, ruling them as UNCONSTITUTIONAL. Trump & MAGA are FUMING.

This is LAW & ORDER!
Trump admitted to watching Bad Bunny instead of Turning Point. Tonight was great, and this was the cherry on top.
Bad Bunny was the right choice. Great performance & great message.

BREAKING: The TPUSA “All American Halftime Show” is complete ass😭

Video

btw bad bunny is the second largest american artist. why would y’all not expect him to get a half time show? 

if anything i’m surprised it’s just now happening.
holy shit you’re such a little bitch bro, just shut up and watch the game😭
“yeah he’s racist but you’re fat”

Okay so let me get this straight… a “White House staffer” uploaded a racist video to Trumps Truth Social account, while in that same hour also uploading 75 other posts including videos of dogs eating whipped cream.

What an obvious bold face lie.

BREAKING: Trump just posted an incredibly racist photo of the Obama’s faces photoshopped on to the body of apes.

Every day is a new rock bottom for this ugly pig.
I never thought I’d be reporting this headline but here we are. The Trump Administration is crumbling!
Death. Fire. Fury. “President of Peace” btw. Here are your US Iran War Updates.
From oil rain, to burning roads. This is insane. US Iran War Updates.
Trump Has Fired Kristi Noem, Replacing Her With Senator Mullen from Oklahoma.
The US & Iran War Is Expanding, you can expect this to hurt you. I’ll keep you updated as we learn more.
America Is At War with Iran. Here’s Everything You Need To Know.
This is Major. The US & Israel have Struck Iran. This is an Act of War.
We can’t let this story die. This message needs to be amplified.
This is a MASSIVE WIN For America!
America it’s your turn. Step up and cuff em.
